field_decisions.value: Luxembourg has linguistic leave for eligible Luxembourgish courses and a separate company-training co-funding route for eligible private-sector training, but A6's own eligibility under either route is not yet proven.
field_decisions.reason: The scheme-level routes are directly evidenced by official Luxembourg pages.

field_decisions.value: Biergerpakt is a voluntary public programme for adults who live or work in Luxembourg, with introductory and advanced modules covering language, civic participation, administrative procedures, and life in Luxembourg.
field_decisions.reason: This is a direct official programme description and is safe to retain as public-context truth.
Public and private alternatives are directly evidenced.

value: Legacy 47% workforce-share copy is wrong; the verified figure is 45.1%
The absolute uniqueness claim is contradicted by public and private alternatives
Product-specific eligibility under linguistic leave or CVT co-funding is unverified
Any A6-issued certificate or Sproochtest-readiness evaluation has no verified external acceptance value
Turnover-reduction and ROI claims are unverified
field_decisions.reason: These are the concrete fail-closed constraints after the rerun.

field_decisions.value: The European Commission page says cross-border workers make up 45.1% of Luxembourg's workforce.
field_decisions.omission_reason: It is a useful context statistic, but it is still a single-source numeric signal and not a default dashboard field for this product.

field_decisions.value: HR teams, mobility managers, and relocated employees entering Luxembourg's multilingual and cross-border context.
field_decisions.omission_reason: This is a useful synthesis, but it remains partly inferential and should not be treated as default dashboard truth.
The rerun verified the surrounding routes and substitutes, not the exact boundary of A6's own bundle.
Official scheme-level routes exist, but A6's own eligibility under them is not publicly verified.
Recognized routes were found at INLL, not for any A6-issued certificate or assessment.
The turnover-reduction and ROI claims have no verified evidence in this rerun.
